plainLyrics:
I've been fucking hoesin' poppin' Philly's men
I feel just like a rock star
All my brothers got that guessing they always be smokin' like a rock star
Fukin' with me called up on the oozey and show up and have the shot toss
When my homies pull up on your black, they make that thing go got the dot dot
Hey, switch my whip came back in black, I'm starting sayin' recipes of hot sky
Close that doughy blowin' smoke, they ask me light up fire like a morsel
Back to full on stage, probably leave my fuckin' show in a cop car
Hey
Shit was legendary through a TV, I know it know it a month
I was cookin' on the table lick upon, don't give it damn
Don't you govin' is a group, we see just tryna get it
Sayin' I'm with the band
Hey
Hey
Not see acting out a pocket, tryna grab it on my pants
On their pictures in my trillet, say that ain't got a man
And they got brought afraaaan
Yeah
Hey
I've been fuckin' hoesin' poppin' Philly's men
I feel just like a rock star
All my brothers got that guessing they always be smokin' like a rock star
Fukin' with me called up on the oozey and show up and have the shot toss
My homies pull up on your blood and make that thing go grata-tata
I been in the heels fuckin' superstars, feeling like a pop star
Drinking in the bad bitches jumping in the pool and hang out on the old bra
Get a funer bat, pullin' on the tracks and now she's screaming out no more
Hey like savage, why you got a twer, a car garage and you only got this car
I ain't with the cake and how you kids that
Yo wifey saying I'm lookin' like a whole snap
Green hunders in my safe, I got old racks
LA bitches, I always askin' what a cold get
Living like a rock star, smash that on a cop car
Sweeter in a pop star, you know you are not hard
How they made the hat chart, remember I used to chop hard
Living like a rock star, I'm living like a rock star
I've been fuckin' hoesin' poppin' Philly's men
I feel just like a rock star
All my brothers got that guess and they always be smokin' like a rock star
Fuckin' with me, callin' up on those who's the insure workin' them that shot shots
My homies pull up on your blood and make that thing go grata-tata
Let go
